TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rulakes, title = Rulakes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rulakes} }

S.FORM: alang Rulakes ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong goo, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 374 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 352 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 72%, Rukay 12%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rulakes ga Tjukuvulj ru Djumulj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Rulakes ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Rulakes ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Rulakes ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Rulakes ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong goo, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 374 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 352 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 72%, Rukay 12%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rulakes ga Tjukuvulj ru Djumulj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Rulakes ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Rulakes ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Rulakes ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ rulakes~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣoo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na rulakes~ɕ ɣa tjuku*ulj ru *jumulj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ rulakes~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ rulakes~ɕ ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ rulakes~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
